name: junkshop-otg-monorepo
description: JunkShop On-The-Go — run frontend, admin portal, super admin portal, and backend together

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend,admin,super -c blue,green,magenta,cyan "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev --prefix admin-portal" "npm run dev --prefix super-admin-portal"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix admin-portal && npm install --prefix super-admin-portal
